user.title: AlertSys
user.description: Enable the AlertSys alert management integration.

quit.name: Quit alert
quit.description: Reset alert to idle state. Only works if the alert condition is no longer active. Without an entity, quit all alerts.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The alert entity to quit. Leave empty for all alerts.

ack.name: Acknowledge alert
ack.description: Acknowledge an active alert. The alert stays active but is marked as acknowledged.

unack.name: Revoke acknowledgement
unack.description: Revoke acknowledgement on an active alert.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The alert entity to revoke acknowledgement from.

ack_toggle.name: Toggle acknowledgement
ack_toggle.description: Toggle the acknowledgement state of an active alert. If acknowledged, revokes it; if not, acknowledges it.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The alert entity to toggle acknowledgement on.
